tasks.subject: Task 1: Stage 0 — Instrumentación (MovementProbe + CSV baseline)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Capturar baseline medible (hero_units_per_sec + frame timing) con la matemática extraída a módulo puro testeable.

**Verify:** ctest --test-dir out/build/windows-x86 -C Debug -R movement_probe --output-on-failure

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/source/Core/Diagnostics/MovementProbe.h", "src/source/Core/Diagnostics/MovementProbe.cpp", "tests/diagnostics/test_movement_probe.cpp", "tests/CMakeLists.txt", "src/source/Scenes/SceneManager.cpp"], "verifyCommand": "ctest --test-dir out/build/windows-x86 -C Debug -R movement_probe --output-on-failure", "acceptanceCriteria": ["UnitsPerSec frame-rate independiente", "CSV con columnas definidas", "flag apagado por defecto costo cero", "baseline 30/60/144 capturado"], "tags": []}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Stage 1 — SimulationClock (acumulador fixed-step puro)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Núcleo del fixed timestep como clase pura sin deps de engine, con tests de invariancia frame-rate. Reemplaza el cálculo temporal de CalcFPS.

**Verify:** ctest --test-dir out/build/windows-x86 -C Debug -R simulation_clock --output-on-failure

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/source/Core/Time/SimulationClock.h", "src/source/Core/Time/SimulationClock.cpp", "tests/time/test_simulation_clock.cpp", "tests/CMakeLists.txt"], "verifyCommand": "ctest --test-dir out/build/windows-x86 -C Debug -R simulation_clock --output-on-failure", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Advance devuelve steps/alpha/droppedDebt", "invariancia 8ms vs 40ms = 25 steps", "MAX_STEPS corta spiral", "frameMs neg/clamp guardado"], "tags": []}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Stage 1b — Cablear SimulationClock en MainLoop (factor ≡ 1.0)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Correr la sim a paso fijo en MainLoop con FPS_ANIMATION_FACTOR ≡ 1.0 → comportamiento idéntico al baseline a todo FPS. Render recibe alpha.

**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Cerrar sólo tras re-validar cada criterio con evidencia capturada (CSV baseline vs post-cambio).

**Verify:** ctest --test-dir out/build/windows-x86 -C Debug --output-on-failure; CSV baseline vs nueva captura plano ±2% (E1) y velocidad sostenida 10 FPS (E2)

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/source/App/Platform/Windows/Winmain.cpp", "src/source/Scenes/SceneManager.cpp", "src/source/Scenes/SceneCore.h", "src/source/Engine/AI/ZzzAI.cpp"], "verifyCommand": "ctest --test-dir out/build/windows-x86 -C Debug --output-on-failure", "acceptanceCriteria": ["sim en FixedUpdate fuera de RenderScene", "FPS_ANIMATION_FACTOR == 1.0", "E1 plano +/-2% vs baseline 30/60/144", "E2 velocidad sostenida 10 FPS", "ctest verde"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "requireEvidenceTokens": [["baseline"], ["post-cambio"]]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Stage 2 — Movimiento local (cat A → u/tick + snapshot/lerp Hero)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Migrar movimiento del Hero a unidades por tick y renderizar con interpolación snapshot prev/cur (alpha).

**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Cerrar sólo con E1 re-validado y evidencia CSV capturada.

**Verify:** ctest --test-dir out/build/windows-x86 -C Debug -R motion --output-on-failure; E1 plano vs baseline

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/source/Render/Interpolation.h", "src/source/Render/Interpolation.cpp", "src/source/Engine/Object/ZzzCharacter.cpp", "tests/motion/test_motion_integration.cpp"], "verifyCommand": "ctest --test-dir out/build/windows-x86 -C Debug -R motion --output-on-failure", "acceptanceCriteria": ["IntegratePosition pura invariante 30 vs 240", "Hero interpolado sin jitter", "E1 plano +/-2%", "ctest verde"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "requireEvidenceTokens": [["baseline", "30fps"], ["240fps"]]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Stage 3 — Entidades remotas (interp a estado servidor + buffer)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Interpolar otros jugadores/mobs hacia el estado del servidor con buffer de 1–2 ticks; reducir rubber-band.

**Verify:** ctest --test-dir out/build/windows-x86 -C Debug -R remote_interp --output-on-failure

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/temporal/03-entidades-remotas.md", "tests/motion/test_remote_interp.cpp"], "verifyCommand": "ctest --test-dir out/build/windows-x86 -C Debug -R remote_interp --output-on-failure", "acceptanceCriteria": ["buffer interp red testeado no extrapola", "remotas suaves", "ctest verde"], "tags": []}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Stage 4 — Animaciones (avance lógico en tick + blend frameMs)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Avanzar el frame de animación en la sim (tick) y mezclar visualmente con frameMs; misma duración a todo FPS.

**Verify:** ctest --test-dir out/build/windows-x86 -C Debug -R anim --output-on-failure

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/source/Render/Models/ZzzBMD.cpp", "tests/anim/test_anim_advance.cpp"], "verifyCommand": "ctest --test-dir out/build/windows-x86 -C Debug -R anim --output-on-failure", "acceptanceCriteria": ["avance animacion puro invariante", "sin doble velocidad", "ctest verde"], "tags": []}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Stage 5 — Cámara cinemática (cat E → dt real)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Portar travel/zoom de la cámara cinemática (cat E sin factor) a dt real → cutscenes duran lo mismo a todo FPS.

**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Cerrar sólo con E5 re-validado y evidencia capturada.

**Verify:** ctest --test-dir out/build/windows-x86 -C Debug -R camera --output-on-failure; E5 plano

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/source/Camera/CameraMove.cpp", "tests/camera/test_camera_travel.cpp"], "verifyCommand": "ctest --test-dir out/build/windows-x86 -C Debug -R camera --output-on-failure", "acceptanceCriteria": ["travel/zoom puro por-dt invariante", "E5 duracion cutscene igual", "ctest verde"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "requireEvidenceTokens": [["30fps"], ["240fps"]]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Stage 6 — Física de efectos (D re-integrar, C rediseñar, B✗ → pow)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Arreglar categorías rotas que aceleran/densifican sobre 25 FPS: re-integrar proyectiles/pet/cloth (D), rediseñar conteos enteros (C) a tiempos/ticks sin overflow, corregir decays rotos (B✗) a forma pow.

**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Cerrar sólo con E3/E4/E6 re-validados y evidencia capturada.

**Verify:** ctest --test-dir out/build/windows-x86 -C Debug -R effect --output-on-failure; E3/E4/E6 planos

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/source/Engine/Object/ZzzEffect.cpp", "src/source/Engine/Object/ZzzEffectParticle.cpp", "src/source/Engine/Object/ZzzEffectJoint.cpp", "src/source/GameLogic/Pets/CSPetSystem.cpp", "src/source/Engine/AI/GOBoid.cpp", "tests/effects/test_effect_physics.cpp"], "verifyCommand": "ctest --test-dir out/build/windows-x86 -C Debug -R effect --output-on-failure", "acceptanceCriteria": ["B-roto decay pow puro testeado", "cat C conteos a ticks sin overflow", "cat D re-integracion mismo alcance 30 vs 240", "E3/E4/E6 planos", "ctest verde"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "requireEvidenceTokens": [["30fps", "baseline"], ["240fps"]]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Stage 7 — UI / networking visual (formalizar buffer interp)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** La UI ya usa delta; formalizar el buffer de interpolación de red como API estable; verificar sin regresión.

**Verify:** ctest --test-dir out/build/windows-x86 -C Debug --output-on-failure; revisión visual sin regresión

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/temporal/07-ui-networking.md"], "verifyCommand": "ctest --test-dir out/build/windows-x86 -C Debug --output-on-failure", "acceptanceCriteria": ["API buffer interp estable", "sin regresion UI", "ctest verde"], "tags": []}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Stage 8 — Limpieza (borrar factor/clamp/REFERENCE_FPS)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Eliminar FPS_ANIMATION_FACTOR, el clamp y REFERENCE_FPS; cerrar la migración.

**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Cerrar sólo con grep re-ejecutado y salida capturada.

**Verify:** grep -rn "FPS_ANIMATION_FACTOR|REFERENCE_FPS" src/source → vacío; ctest --test-dir out/build/windows-x86 -C Debug --output-on-failure verde

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/source/Engine/AI/ZzzAI.cpp", "tests/regression/test_speed_invariance.cpp"], "verifyCommand": "grep -rn \"FPS_ANIMATION_FACTOR|REFERENCE_FPS\" src/source; ctest --test-dir out/build/windows-x86 -C Debug --output-on-failure", "acceptanceCriteria": ["grep FPS_ANIMATION_FACTOR = 0", "grep REFERENCE_FPS = 0", "suite regresion E1-E6 verde", "ctest verde"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"]}
```
